title: Hypothesis Testing Decision Flow
description: A flowchart depicting the step-by-step logical process for conducting a statistical hypothesis test, from stating hypotheses to making a final conclusion.
elements: Select Appropriate Test & Calculate Test Statistic
Make Decision: Reject or Fail to Reject H₀
relationships: Sequential flow from one step to the next, with a decision point leading to one of two conclusions based on the comparison of the test statistic to the critical value or the p-value to α
